data.title: Two newly created addresses withdrew 22,434 ETH from Kraken, worth about $795 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 6 hours ago, two newly created wallets withdrew a total of 22,434 ETH from Kraken, which was valued at about US$795 million at the time.

data.title: Altcoins Take the Lead – Why We Rotated Into ETH and Stayed Nimble
data.description:
ETH and SOL surged as legislation, ETF flows, and leverage drove altcoin momentum. We rotated into ETH early, maintained BTC core, and held 10% cash to manage overheated risk.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/19/altcoins-take-the-lead-why-we-rotated-into-eth-and-stayed-nimble/

These blockchain-based deposits retain traditional protections like insurance and central bank support while enabling programmable payments.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with Notable Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on July 19, with several tokens showing significant gains and others facing notable declines. Leading the day's gains, CRV is currently priced at $0.995, marking a 4.44% increase. DOGE follows with a price of $0.242, up by 2.23%, while XRP is valued at $3.442, reflecting a 2.02% rise. AAVE stands at $319.78, with a modest gain of 0.67%, and SATS is priced at $0.0000000484, up by 0.66%.

Conversely, several tokens experienced declines. OP is currently priced at $0.738, showing a decrease of 5.46%. ARB follows with a price of $0.448, down by 4.63%. 1INCH is valued at $0.313, reflecting a 3.99% drop, while LUNC stands at $0.0000656, down by 3.98%. NOT is priced at $0.00224, marking a decline of 3.94%.

data.title: Plasma: XPL public sale launched only one day ago, the community has oversubscribed by 211%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Stablecoin Layer2 network Plasma said on X this morning that one day after the XPL public sale was launched, the community had oversubscribed by more than 211%.

data.title: Charles Schwab Plans Stablecoin Amid ETF Trading Expansion
data.description:
Charles Schwab explores stablecoin issuance, expanding into crypto ETFs, impacting blockchain transactions and investor access.
source: https://coincu.com/349499-schwab-stablecoin-crypto-etfs

data.title: OpenAI Launches $50 Million Fund to Support Nonprofits and Community Organizations
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI announced on July 18, 2025, the initiation of a $50 million fund aimed at supporting nonprofit and community organizations. The company stated that this fund will be used to collaborate with partners to harness the transformative potential of artificial intelligence in areas such as education, economic opportunities, community organization, and healthcare. OpenAI plans to expand its impact and foster innovation through this initiative. Additionally, the company will support community-led research and innovation to leverage AI's potential for public welfare.

data.title: Jack Dorsey's company Block joins the S&P 500 index, the company holds 8,584 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Block (NYSE: XYZ), a payment company owned by Jack Dorsey, the founder of Twitter (now called X), has joined the S&P 500 index. According to data from the BitcoinTreasuries.net website, Block holds 8,584 BTC, ranking 11th among listed companies holding BTC.

data.title: The total market value of the giant whale AguilaTrades' holdings reached US$294 million, and the ETH short position made a huge profit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa), the whale AguilaTrades currently holds positions in both ETH and BTC, with a total market value of US$294 million. Among them, ETH 15x short positions hold 50,000 pieces, with an average opening price of US$3,586.79 and a floating profit of US$2.674 million; BTC 20x short positions hold 1,000 pieces, with an opening price of US$117,807.3 and a current floating loss of US$173,000.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Signs Groundbreaking Digital Asset Legislation
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has officially signed the GENIUS Act, a significant piece of legislation concerning stablecoins. This act is considered the most supportive regulatory framework for digital assets in U.S. history. Senator Cynthia Lummis expressed her approval of the legislation, highlighting its importance in advancing the management of digital assets.

data.title: JPMorgan Advocates Tokenized Deposits Over Stablecoins, Testing New Solutions
data.description:
JPMorgan and regulators like the Bank of England prefer tokenized deposits over stablecoins for safety and regulation benefits.
source: https://coincu.com/349495-tokenezied-deposits-stablecoins-jpmorgan

data.title: Charles Schwab Considers Launching Its Own Stablecoin
data.description: According to PANews, Charles Schwab's CEO Rick Wurster announced during a Friday earnings call that the company is contemplating the issuance of its own stablecoin. Wurster highlighted the potential role of stablecoins in blockchain transactions, aligning with the company's aspirations to offer such services. The call also revealed that Charles Schwab is preparing to introduce Bitcoin and Ethereum spot ETFs for its clients. Despite managing over $7 trillion in assets, the brokerage giant has maintained a cautious approach towards incorporating cryptocurrency investment options into its offerings.

data.title: REX-Osprey SOL ETF Sees Significant Inflows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that the REX-Osprey SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $11.4 million yesterday. This brings the total net inflow to $92.8 million after market hours.

data.title: BoE tells banks to brace for dollar shock
data.description:
The Bank of England (BoE ) has requested several banks to examine their ability to resist incoming US dollar shocks amid Trump's policies, increasing US financial confidence.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/boe-tells-banks-to-brace-for-dollar-shock/

data.title: James Wynn: BTC.D rebounds, alt season may be postponed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News James Wynn said on the X platform that as the Bitcoin dominance rate (BTC.D) rebounds, funds are flowing out of altcoins, and the altcoin season that the market originally expected may be temporarily shelved.

data.title: Bitcoin Dominance Rises, Impacting Altcoin Market
data.description: According to Odaily, James Wynn stated on the X platform that as Bitcoin's dominance (BTC.D) increases, funds are moving away from altcoins. This shift suggests that the anticipated altcoin season may be temporarily postponed.
